title: Hoist and sling — checks before every use
source: ME03 Lifts and Hoists Policy and Procedure
scopeNote: Pre-use safety checks and competency. The physical hoisting technique is a separate handling procedure and is not shown here.

steps.label: Only use if trained
steps.caption: Only staff trained and assessed as competent should use a hoist.

steps.label: Check the inspection date
steps.caption: The hoist must be examined every 6 months — do not use it if it is overdue.

steps.label: Check brakes, straps, and sling
steps.caption: Look over the brakes, straps, hooks, and sling before every use.

steps.label: Damaged? Take it out of use
steps.caption: Stop, label it 'do not use', and report it to your manager.

steps.label: Stay with the person
steps.caption: A staff member stays with the person the whole time.

endFrame: If anything looks wrong, stop and report it — never take a risk.
